nl_prompt: What percentage of revenue comes from our top 20 percent of customers?
gold_sql: WITH customer_rev AS (SELECT customer_id, SUM(line_value) as rev FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id), ranked AS (SELECT rev, NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY rev DESC) as quintile FROM customer_rev) SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN quintile = 1 THEN rev END) / SUM(rev), 2) as top20_pct FROM ranked
